scope_summary: WAPC position statement announcing the intent to discontinue the Special Residential zone in local planning schemes and providing interim guidance for subdivision, use and development on land already zoned Special Residential. It applies to land zoned special residential under a local planning scheme anywhere in WA. The WAPC will not support rezoning land to special residential; on scheme review such land is to be recoded to an alternative zone (e.g. Residential at R2, R2.5 or R5), and structure plan/subdivision assessment criteria cover lot size, servicing, roads, open space, bushfire and drainage.

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: lots within existing special residential zones (structure plan / subdivision layout)
land currently zoned special residential when rezoned on scheme review
subdivision in special residential zones (due to larger lot sizes)

quality_flags: multi-column PDF extraction interleaves columns, scrambling sentence order (e.g. cl 5.2.6 continuation appears before its start)
summary.json title is garbled ('Department of Planning,') - publisher header captured instead of instrument title
manifest instrument_name uses plural 'Zones'; document title is singular 'Special Residential Zone'
